log: ══ ROUND 1 ══
--- Tortle — Armored Tank --- HP: 59/59 | AC: 20
REASONING: ROUND 1: 1 enemies. Opening with Hypnotic Pattern.
ACTION: Cast Hypnotic Pattern (Level 3 slot, 2 remaining). DC 15 WIS save. 30ft cube.
→ Lich: WIS save [d20:10+9=19 vs DC 15] SUCCESS. Resists.
→ No targets affected. Spell wasted.
REASONING: Power Word Stun on Tortle — Armored Tank (HP 59 ≤ 150). Auto-stun!
══ ROUND 2 ══
--- Tortle — Armored Tank --- HP: 59/59 | AC: 20
REASONING: No concentration. Hold Person on Lich (paralyzed = auto-crit in melee).
ACTION: Cast Hold Person (Level 2 slot, 2 remaining). DC 15 WIS save on Lich.
→ Lich: WIS save [d20:9+9=18 vs DC 15] SUCCESS. No effect.
REASONING: Finger of Death on Tortle — Armored Tank. 7d8+30 necrotic.
ACTION: Cast Finger of Death (Level 7 slot, 0 remaining). DC 20 CON save on Tortle — Armored Tank.
→ Tortle — Armored Tank: CON save [d20:1+4=5 vs DC 20] FAIL! 32 necrotic damage. HP: 27/59
══ ROUND 3 ══
--- Tortle — Armored Tank --- HP: 27/59 | AC: 20
REASONING: No concentration. Hold Person on Lich (paralyzed = auto-crit in melee).
ACTION: Cast Hold Person (Level 2 slot, 1 remaining). DC 15 WIS save on Lich.
→ Lich: WIS save [d20:8+9=17 vs DC 15] SUCCESS. No effect.
REASONING: Fireball on 1 targets!
ACTION: Cast Fireball (Level 3 slot, 2 remaining). DC 20 DEX save. 20ft sphere.
→ Tortle — Armored Tank: SUCCESS. 17 damage (half).
→ No targets affected. Spell wasted.
══ ROUND 4 ══
--- Tortle — Armored Tank --- HP: 10/59 | AC: 20

ACTION: Cast Greater Invisibility (Level 4 slot, 1 remaining).
→ Tortle — Armored Tank is affected by Greater Invisibility.
REASONING: Fireball on 1 targets!
ACTION: Cast Fireball (Level 3 slot, 1 remaining). DC 20 DEX save. 20ft sphere.
→ Tortle — Armored Tank: FAIL! 27 fire damage + .
→ Concentration save: [d20(ADV):17+4=21 vs DC 13] MAINTAINED!
